caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a gold chain, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold lettering is seated in a studio. He is wearing headphones and speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him, a white banner displays the words "UNICORN HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". On the table in front of him sits a black mug featuring red text that includes "BOSS TALK OUT". The man is captured in a medium shot, speaking and gesturing slightly with his facial expressions. Across the sequence, he remains in the same position, though his mouth moves and his head shifts slightly as he talks. To his left, a black piece of equipment is partially visible on the table.
